transcript: Speaker A: யாராவது இங்கிலீஷ் பேசி பிராக்டிஸ் பண்ணா நல்லா இருக்குமே. [If only there was someone to practice speaking English with...] ஓகே, MySivi ஆப்புக்கு போலாம். [Okay, let's go to the MySivi app.] இதுல இருக்குற கோ-லேர்னர்ஸ்ல ட்ரை பண்ணலாம். [Let's try with the co-learners here.] Hello! Speaker B: Hi! Speaker A: What's your name? Speaker B: My name is... Speaker A: Where are you from? Speaker B: I'm from Karnataka. Speaker A: Oh okay, where in Karnataka? Speaker B: Bangalore. Speaker A: Okay, nice, nice. Speaker B: What about you? Speaker A: I'm from Kerala, but I'm currently working in Bangalore. Speaker B: Oh, great. How long you are in Bangalore? Speaker A: It's just like 8 months. Speaker B: Okay. Speaker A: What do you do? Speaker B: Oh, working in Bangalore. Speaker A: Okay. So your hometown is also in Bangalore? Speaker B: No, no, like other district. But Karnataka itself. Speaker A: Oh, nice. வாவ், ரொம்ப பிரெண்ட்லியா பேசுறாங்க. [Wow, they speak so friendly.] இதே மாதிரி நீங்களும் இங்கிலீஷ் பேசி பிராக்டிஸ் பண்ணனும்னா, உடனே MySivi ஆப்ப டவுன்லோட் பண்ணி, ஒரு ரூபாய்க்கு ஸ்டார்ட் பண்ணுங்க. [If you also want to practice speaking English like this, download the MySivi app right away and start for just one rupee.]
on_screen_text: MySivi AI English Speaking, Master Spoken Eng, Sale Ends Today, UNLOCK EVERYTHING, 3 naatkalukku ₹30 ₹1 [3 days for ₹30 ₹1], SALUGAI [OFFER], Aprum ₹299/month [Then ₹299/month], Cancel Anytime, MySivi Pro Sirappugal [MySivi Pro Features], 24/7 Personal AI English Teacher, Udanadi feedback oda unga grammar-a seri seiya mudiyum. [You can correct your grammar with instant feedback.]
summary: A Tamil-speaking user demonstrates how to practice English using the MySivi app by connecting with a friendly co-learner for a live conversation. The ad highlights the ease of finding practice partners and promotes a special offer to start for just ₹1.
